title: GTBIF Stock Earnings: Green Thumb Industries Beats EPS for Q2 2024
text: Green Thumb Industries exceeded analyst expectations in its second quarter 2024 results. The cannabis retailer reported earnings per share of 9 cents, surpassing the projected 5 cents estimate. The company generated $280.15 million in quarterly revenue, which represented a modest 1.05% outperformance compared to the analyst forecast of $277.24 million. Key financial metrics included Adjusted EBITDA of $94 million or 33.5% of revenue, and gross profit of $151 million or 53.7% of revenue. The earnings report demonstrates the company's ability to deliver stronger-than-expected profitability while maintaining solid revenue growth during the period. Three new stores were opened through June, with 7-8 more expected by year-end. CPG Revenue increased by over 15% compared to Q2 last year. Share repurchase included 1.6 million shares for approximately $20 million. Cash balance reached $196 million at the end of the quarter.
